Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a single educational course offered by the institution.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

instructor.description: The name of the instructor teaching the course.

duration.description: The estimated duration of the course (e.g., '6 weeks', '3 months').

shortDescription.description: A brief summary of the course content.

longDescription.description: A detailed description of the course, potentially AI-generated for enrichment.

imageUrl.description: URL to the course's image, stored in Firebase Storage.

isFeatured.description: Indicates if the course should be highlighted on the homepage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the course was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the course was last updated.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Details about an upcoming event or workshop organized by the institution.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

date.description: The date and time when the event will take place.

description.description: A detailed description of the event.

imageUrl.description: URL to the event's image, stored in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: A testimonial from a student or alumnus.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Testimonial entity.

authorName.description: The name of the person giving the testimonial.

authorTitle.description: The title or role of the author (e.g., 'Student', 'Alumnus', 'Graduate 2023').

content.description: The actual text content of the testimonial.

rating.description: Star rating given by the student (1 to 5).

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to the author's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the testimonial was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the testimonial was last updated.

AdmissionInquiry.title: AdmissionInquiry
AdmissionInquiry.description: A record of an admission inquiry submitted by a prospective student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AdmissionInquiry entity.

name.description: The full name of the inquirer.

email.description: The email address of the inquirer.

phone.description: The phone number of the inquirer.

selectedCourseId.description: Reference to the Course entity the inquirer is interested in. (Relationship: Course 1:N AdmissionInquiry)

message.description: Any additional message or question from the inquirer.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the inquiry was submitted.

ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: A message submitted via the website's contact form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContactMessage entity.

name.description: The full name of the sender.

email.description: The email address of the sender.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the message was submitted.

WebsiteSetting.title: WebsiteSetting
WebsiteSetting.description: Stores global website configuration and content for static pages, managed by admin. Intended to be a singleton entity (e.g., ID 'main').

id.description: Unique identifier for the WebsiteSetting entity (expected to be a fixed value like 'main').

siteName.description: The name of the educational website (e.g., 'EduFlow').

mainEmail.description: The primary contact email address for the institution.

mainPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the institution.

address.description: The physical address of the institution.

googleMapEmbedUrl.description: URL for embedding a Google Map location on the contact page.

heroHeadline.description: The main headline for the homepage hero section.

heroDescription.description: The descriptive text accompanying the hero headline on the homepage.

heroImages.description: An array of image URLs for the homepage hero background slider.

aboutTitle.description: The title for the 'About the institute' section on the homepage.

aboutContent.description: The detailed content for the 'About the institute' section on the homepage.

aboutImage.description: The image URL for the 'About' section.

contactHeadline.description: The main headline for the contact page.

contactDescription.description: The descriptive text for the contact page.

socialMediaLinks.description: An array of objects, each representing a social media link for the institution.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the website settings were last updated.

definition.description: Stores details of all educational courses.
Stores messages submitted via the contact form.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to meet core principles...
